raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request to help with a research section includes checking whether the thesis, gap, and contribution framing are clear and coherent.","R1.2":"The technical section depends on a chain from iteration model to backward-error bound to convergence interpretation, making logical consistency central.","R1.3":"The section invokes numerical experiments and representative instances, so claims should align with the reported empirical support.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are expected responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a section most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level improvement, making writing polish load-bearing.","RX.1":"Uncertainty should be disclosed where the artifact makes technical or literature-scope claims that may not be fully verifiable from the excerpt.","RX.2":"The projection must preserve caution around novelty, empirical confirmation, and order-of-magnitude tightening claims.","RX.3":"The response must stay within helping with this section rather than executing broader paper review or rewriting unrelated material.","RX.4":"Technical overstatement in numerical-analysis claims could mislead downstream research use, so harm avoidance is active.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to explicit features of the provided section and delegation."}}

rationale.R1.1: The broad request to help with a research section includes checking whether the thesis, gap, and contribution framing are clear and coherent.
rationale.R1.2: The technical section depends on a chain from iteration model to backward-error bound to convergence interpretation, making logical consistency central.
rationale.R1.3: The section invokes numerical experiments and representative instances, so claims should align with the reported empirical support.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are expected responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a section most directly asks for sentence- and paragraph-level improvement, making writing polish load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty should be disclosed where the artifact makes technical or literature-scope claims that may not be fully verifiable from the excerpt.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must preserve caution around novelty, empirical confirmation, and order-of-magnitude tightening claims.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within helping with this section rather than executing broader paper review or rewriting unrelated material.
rationale.RX.4: Technical overstatement in numerical-analysis claims could mislead downstream research use, so harm avoidance is active.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to explicit features of the provided section and delegation.
